patterns.hint: Missing dependency. Run: poetry install (or pip install -e '.[dev]')
Run: poetry add chromadb (or pip install chromadb)
Run: poetry add tree-sitter tree-sitter-languages (or pip install tree-sitter tree-sitter-languages)
Qdrant is not running. Start it: docker compose up -d qdrant
Admin API server not running. Start it: uvicorn src.<package>.api.app:app --reload
Ports-and-adapters violation: core/ must not import from storage/, mcp/, or retrieval/. Use protocols in core/ports.py instead. See PROJECT.md #Architecture Rules.

patterns.match: import chromadb|import qdrant_client|import qdrant|from chromadb|from qdrant_client|from qdrant
patterns.hint: Direct backend import outside storage/. Use the VectorStorePort protocol instead. See PROJECT.md #Architecture Rules.
Inline prompt detected. All prompts must be in versioned YAML files in prompts/. See PROJECT.md #Key Conventions.
mypy strict violation: Any type detected. Use explicit types for all public functions. See PROJECT.md #Key Conventions.
Tool count exceeding target. Consolidate related operations into parameterized tools. Target: < 10 tools total. See PROJECT.md #MCP Server Rules.
